svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Development Workflow" id="dev-workflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="1422" dy="900" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="開発ワークフロー: Jetson + MacBook 分散開発" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="20" width="600" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- MacBook Development --> <mxCell id="mac-dev-section" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="80" width="400" height="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="mac-title" value="MacBook (開発環境)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#dae8fc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="90" width="360" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step1" value="1. コード編集<br>VS Code / Editor" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1976d2;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="130" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step2" value="2. ローカルビルド確認<br>(構文チェック)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e3f2fd;strokeColor=#1976d2;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="200" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step3" value="3. Git commit/push<br>リポジトリ更新" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="270" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-1-2" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" target="step2"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-2-3" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" target="step3"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- VS Code Remote option --> <mxCell id="vscode-remote-box" value="VS Code Remote SSH<br>Jetsonに直接接続して編集も可能" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#fbc02d;fontSize=10;dashed=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="310" y="130" width="170" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-remote" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" target="vscode-remote-box"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Git Repository --> <mxCell id="git-repo" value="Git Repository<br>(GitHub/GitLab等)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#333333;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;strokeWidth=2" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="270" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-push" value="push" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#388e3c;" edge="1" parent="1" source="step3" target="git-repo"> <mxGeometry x="-0.2" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Jetson Execution --> <mxCell id="jetson-exec-section" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="80" width="400" height="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="jetson-title" value="Jetson (実行環境)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="920" y="90" width="360" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step4" value="4. Git pull<br>最新コード取得" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="130" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step5" value="5. colcon build<br>ARM向けビルド" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#fbc02d;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="200" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step6" value="6. ros2 launch<br>実機で実行" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="270" width="140" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-4-5" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="step4" target="step5"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-5-6" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;" edge="1" parent="1" source="step5" target="step6"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="arrow-pull" value="pull" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#388e3c;curved=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="git-repo" target="step4"> <mxGeometry x="-0.2" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="800" y="295" /> <mxPoint x="800" y="100" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- SSH commands --> <mxCell id="ssh-box" value="SSH経由でも操作可能<br><br>ssh jetson<br>cd ~/ros2_ws<br>git pull<br>colcon build" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;align=left;dashed=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="940" y="130" width="150" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Visualization Section --> <mxCell id="viz-section" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8f5e9;strokeColor=#4caf50;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="400" width="1200" height="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="viz-title" value="可視化・デバッグ (MacBook <- ROS 2 DDS -> Jetson)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#e8f5e9;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="410" width="600" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step7" value="7. RViz2<br>ロボット可視化" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#4caf50;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="460" width="120" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step8" value="8. Plotjuggler<br>データプロット" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#4caf50;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="460" width="120" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step9" value="9. rosbag record<br>データ記録" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#4caf50;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="460" width="120" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="step10" value="10. teleop<br>手動操作" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#4caf50;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="460" width="100" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- DDS Network --> <mxCell id="dds-line" value="" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#ff9800;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="140" y="540" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1260" y="540" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="dds-label" value="ROS 2 DDS Topics (WiFi/Ethernet)" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff3e0;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#ff9800" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="525" width="220" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Topics examples --> <mxCell id="topics-flow" value="/robot_state, /joint_states, /imu/data, /tf" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="555" width="200" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="topics-flow2" value="/velocity_command, /joy" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="555" width="150" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Jetson status --> <mxCell id="jetson-running" value="Jetson 実行中<br><br>ros2_control (200Hz)<br>state_estimator<br>safety_monitor<br>rl_policy" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff9c4;strokeColor=#fbc02d;fontSize=10;align=left" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1100" y="450" width="140" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrows from step6 to viz --> <mxCell id="arrow-6-viz" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#ff9800;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="step6" target="viz-section"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="600" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="650" y="350" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Feedback loop --> <mxCell id="feedback-arrow" value="バグ発見 → Step 1 へ戻る" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#e91e63;dashed=1;curved=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="0.2" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="140" y="580" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="140" y="130" as="targetPoint" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="60" y="580" /> <mxPoint x="60" y="130" /> </Array> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Commands Reference --> <mxCell id="cmd-box" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#333333;dashed=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="630" width="1200" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="cmd-title" value="よく使うコマンド" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="640" width="200" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="cmd-mac" value="MacBook側:

# ローカルビルド
cd ~/ros2_ws && colcon build

# Jetsonにログイン
ssh jetson

# 可視化起動
ros2 launch biped_bringup visualization.launch.py" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#e3f2fd;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#1976d2" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="670" width="320" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="cmd-jetson" value="Jetson側:

# コード更新 & ビルド
cd ~/ros2_ws && git pull && colcon build

# ロボット起動
ros2 launch robstride_hardware robstride_control.launch.py

# 全システム起動
ros2 launch biped_bringup robot_bringup.launch.py" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#fff9c4;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#fbc02d" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="670" width="380" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="cmd-debug" value="デバッグ:

# トピック確認
ros2 topic list
ros2 topic echo /robot_state

# ノード確認
ros2 node list
ros2 node info /safety_monitor

# ネットワーク疎通
ros2 multicast receive/send" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#e8f5e9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=1;fontSize=11;strokeColor=#4caf50" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="670" width="230" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Environment setup note --> <mxCell id="env-note" value="両マシン共通設定: export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=42 (~/.bashrc)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffecb3;strokeColor=#ff8f00;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1100" y="670" width="180" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: 開発ワークフロー: Jetson + MacBook 分散開発
Jetsonに直接接続して編集も可能
可視化・デバッグ (MacBook <- ROS 2 DDS -> Jetson)
バグ発見 → Step 1 へ戻る
# コード更新 & ビルド
